description: You are assisting a hilal sighting committee in Mecca, Saudi Arabia (21.4225° N, 39.8262° E, Altitude: 277m), which needs to determine whether the thin new crescent Moon (hilal) will be visible on the evening of March 22, 2023, at 15:45 UTC—the potential first evening of Ramadan 1444 AH. Configure the simulation for a realistic naked-eye hilal observation assessment with Atmosphere enabled, Ground/Landscape disabled, Azimuthal grid enabled, and Planet labels enabled. Document the Moon's position relative to the western horizon and the wider sky context with at least three screenshots saved to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/. Write a hilal visibility assessment report to /home/ga/Desktop/hilal_report.txt that mentions the target (Moon, hilal, or crescent) and the context (Mecca, Ramadan, or 1444).
